chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – What has come regarding the Endive

text: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ هَارُونَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ مَسْعَدَةَ بْنِ صَدَقَةَ عَنْ زِيَادٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ الْهِنْدَبَاءُ سَيِّدُ الْبُقُولِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Haroun Bin Muslim, from Mas’ada Bin sadaqa, from Ziyad,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The endive is the chief of the vegetables’.
